name: D. H. Lawrence
abstract: David Herbert Lawrence (11 September 1885 – 2 March 1930) was an English novelist, short story writer, poet, playwright, literary critic, travel writer, essayist, and painter. His modernist works reflect on modernity, social alienation and industrialisation, while championing sexuality, vitality and instinct.

about_quotes.speaker: Phil Woods
about_quotes.evidence: I remember she was reading “Seven Pillars of Wisdom” by D. H. Lawrence
about_quotes.doc_title: Phil Woods — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
